metadata.title: Sane Magical Prices (2014) curated shop pricing overlay
metadata.usage: Durable pricing/classification overlay input for future DM world-shop generator import flow; not runtime wiring.
metadata.notes: Source prices are a relative-economy tool, not absolute law. Preserve excluded/unpriced entries as non-default shop stock unless manually curated.
metadata.created_from: Repo-stored PDF converted into structured JSON so future one-button import does not depend on chat-uploaded files.
